query:
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(position ORDER BY id) as positions, GROUP_CONCAT(altPositions ORDER BY id SEPARATOR ' | ') as altPos
FROM players
GROUP BY name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT name, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(position ORDER BY id) as positions, GROUP_CONCAT(altPositions ORDER BY id SEPARATOR ' | ') as altPos
FROM players
GROUP BY name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY name;
